title: Luffy Challenges Kaido Again
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Sanji, Unknown person #5, Chopper, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WHAT ARE YOU SAYING?! OF COURSE YOU CAN'T--

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Haha! Queen, you bastard! Serves you right!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Muhahaha! What's the matter, Tanuki?! You're pretty short of breath for someone who's supposed to be winning!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's see how long you can keep that up, perorn~)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One of my attacks are working on him... Dammit!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My gigantic action may last longer know, but I have less than 10 minutes left...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gigantification that only lasts a meager 3 minutes?! Why bother?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But if I stay in monster point any longer...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then what?! Are you really that delicate?! I thought you were supposed to be a pirate!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: "Rumble Ball"!? You call this a formula?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You should just let me design the drug instead!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you gather the ingredients, I'm sure we can increase the time limit of your transformation to 30 minutes!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sure, there will be some added risks involved...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But you're not scared, are you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Arghh!! He's gonna rain down candy arrows again!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have news for everyone on OnigaShima!! A battle result!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Straw hat" Luffy, the Rebel with the highest bounty,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What?! Luffy?! That's im- possi- ble!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Kozuki Samurai and your captain have failed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who wants to be next!? Do any of you have what it takes?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Kin' - Emon and the others too?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kaido-Sama is on his way to oversee "clean-up,"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But he is willing to graciously accept your surrender!!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Maama Mama Mama! Do you hear that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Like I care about that moron!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you raise your hands and swear fealty,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His corpse was dropped to the darkest depths of the night sea!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your life will be spared, and you will be welcomed into the fold!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 59 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
